engineForce.title: Main movement force. Higher = faster acceleration and higher max speed.

strafeModifier.title: Strafe speed vs forward speed. 1 = same, <1= slower.

limbMoveDistance.title: How far from the resting position limbs will try to step while moving.

velocityModifier.title: Modifier to limbMoveDistance, based on mech velocity.
velocityModifier.description: This value is commonly somewhere around 0.6
